tools.name: property_search
tools.description:
Search for real estate properties in Germany using natural language criteria.

Input intent
Use when the user wants to see property listings, such as:
* Apartments, houses, or commercial properties matching criteria
* Price, size, location, or room-based searches
* "Show me listings…" or "Find properties…"

Key inputs
* One or more German cities or regions (Berlin, Munich, Hamburg, etc.)
* Only user-specified filters (price range, number of rooms, property type, rent vs. buy)
* Optional: specific neighborhoods or districts

Output intent
Returns up to 25 property listings in a carousel view, including:
* Location and full address
* Photos (or placeholder if unavailable)
* Price and key property details (rooms, size if available)
* Direct link to property details

Designed for quick browsing and selection.

What it does not do
* No affordability recommendations
* No suggestions on which property to choose
* No financial advice

tools.name: property_map
tools.description:
Search for real estate properties in Germany and display results on an interactive map.

Input intent
Use when the user wants to visualize property locations, such as:
* "Show me on a map…"
* "Map view of properties…"
* Understanding property distribution across neighborhoods
* Comparing locations geographically

Key inputs
* One or more German cities or regions
* Only user-specified filters (same as property_search)
* All matching properties displayed (not limited to 8)

Output intent
Returns all properties with coordinates displayed on interactive map, including:
* Map pins showing property locations and prices
* Clickable pins revealing property cards with photos and details
* Region boundary overlays showing search area
* Direct links to property details

Designed for geographic exploration and location-based decisions.

What it does not do
* No neighborhood recommendations
* No commute time calculations
* No location quality judgments
